description: AgDR-0080 source filter — vaccine question yields only CDC-ACIP chunks. The keyword classifier in evidence_retriever_node sees 'vaccine' / 'immunization' / 'booster' and restricts retrieval to source_organization='CDC-ACIP'. Without this filter, openFDA drug labels and HMS-LOE evidence summaries would clutter the candidate pool with non-vaccine material that the synthesizer would have to disambiguate at higher cost.
what_bug_this_catches: If the question classifier is bypassed or the source_organizations filter is dropped from the retrieval call, vaccine queries return chunks from FDA / HMS-LOE / ADA / ACC-AHA — sources that have nothing to say about vaccine schedules. The synthesizer then either ignores the irrelevant chunks (wasted retrieval cost) or worse, fabricates a vaccine recommendation citing an FDA drug label as a source. This case asserts that all returned chunks (when any are returned) are from CDC-ACIP.

input.query: Is the patient due for a Tdap vaccine booster this year? Check her immunization schedule.
